title: EFILE Helpdesk support - Canada.ca
content:
## EFILE Helpdesk support
Contact your designated EFILE Helpdesk at the phone number indicated on your EFILE Renewal/Registration Confirmation page for the following activities:
- EFILE registration, renewal, account maintenance and/or view transmission history processes;
- EFILE Suitability Screening and/or Monitoring programs; and
- Authentication problems related to EFILE numbers/passwords.
The following chart outlines the offices of responsibility for the above activities:
EFILERS served by tax services offices in:
Hours of Operation Monday to Friday
Sudbury Tax Centre 1050 Notre-Dame Avenue Sudbury ON P3A 5C1 Local and long distance calls: 1-800-361-6283 Fax: 1-833-494-0790

Refer to the chart below for enquiries related to:
- EFILE web service questions regarding error messages for initial and/or amended T1 returns; and
- EFILE web service questions regarding error messages for initial T3 trust returns.

For questions about Auto-fill my return, Express NOA, Multi-factor authentication for T1, or for questions about T3 trust returns, contact the Individual income tax enquiries line .
For questions about filing a T2 Corporation income tax return, refer to the Corporation Internet Filing Help Desk phone numbers and hours of service .
For all other questions, contact the applicable enquiries telephone number .

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
